data.title: BitMine Adds $104M in ETH to Treasury as Fundstrat Predicts $5.5K Target – ETH About to Explode?
data.description:
BitMine Immersion Technologies added 23,823 ETH worth $103. 7 million to its treasury reaching $12. 4 billion total as Fundstrat analyst Mark Newton predicted Ethereum would rally to $5,500, while institutional holdings hit 12. 48 million ETH representing 10. 31% of network supply.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitmine-adds-104m-in-eth-to-treasury-as-fundstrat-predicts-5-5k-target-eth-about-to-explode/

data.title: Crypto market structure talks stall over leaked Democratic DeFi proposal
data.description: Crypto journalist Eleanor Terrett wrote on the X platform that negotiations on the crypto market structure have reached a deadlock due to a leaked Democratic DeFi proposal. The Democrats want to obtain legislative drafting power, the Republicans want to review the legislation, and the industry hopes to establish fair rules for DeFi.

data.title: Sources: Bensont narrows Fed chair candidate list to five
data.description: According to CNBC, after a rigorous series of interviews, U.S. Treasury Secretary Jeffrey Bessant has narrowed his list of candidates for the Federal Reserve Chair from 11 to five. The final candidate may be nominated in January, but may not necessarily assume the chairmanship. According to senior Treasury officials, the remaining candidates include two current Fed officials: Vice Chairman for Supervision Bowman and Governor Waller; National Economic Council Director Hassett; former Fed Governor Anthony Warsh; and BlackRock Chief Information Officer Rick Rieder. The Treasury plans to conduct a new round of interviews with all five candidates in the coming weeks and months. These interviews will be led by Bessant and will include two senior Treasury officials and two senior White House officials. Because Bessant will be focused on the World Bank/IMF meeting in Washington next week before accompanying the president on an extended trip to Asia, officials indicate the interview process may not be completed until after Thanksgiving. Bessant then intends to present a smaller list to Trump, who will make the final decision. However, this person will likely be nominated first as a Fed governor and then as chair. (Jinshi)

data.title: Russia's Central Bank to Permit Cryptocurrency Operations with Strict Regulations
data.description:
According to PANews, the Central Bank of Russia (CBR) has announced plans to allow banks to engage in cryptocurrency activities, subject to stringent capital limits and reserve requirements. This was disclosed by Vladimir Chistyukhin, the First Deputy Governor of the CBR, during the Finopolis Forum. Chistyukhin stated that the bank maintains a conservative stance, questioning whether incorporating cryptocurrencies into balance sheets truly falls within the scope of banking operations. However, after discussions with the professional banking sector, it was acknowledged that bank participation in such activities might be meaningful.

Chistyukhin also highlighted the CBR's intention to pass comprehensive legislation regulating cryptocurrency investments by next year. This legislation would enable authorities to implement a licensing mechanism, with the first licensed service providers expected to enter the market by the end of the year. His call for the swift approval of appropriate cryptocurrency legislation has received support from his superior, Elvira Nabiullina, the Governor of the Central Bank of Russia.

data.title: CZ: HL co-founder Jeff was one of the members of Binance Labs’ first incubation program, but the project ended in failure.
data.description: CZ posted that he'd noticed a buzz on social media regarding Hyperliquid co-founder Jeff appearing in a 2018 Binance Labs photo. Many people may not know that Jeff was a member of the first incubation program at YZi Labs (then Binance Labs) in 2018. Unfortunately, the project failed, and YZi Labs lost all its investment, a common occurrence in the venture capital world. He and Jeff didn't interact much at the time and had long forgotten about the incident. He had planned to speak with Jeff by phone a few months ago, but a scheduling error delayed it, and he hasn't been able to reschedule since. CZ concluded by expressing his support for all builders, no matter what.

data.title: Binance Wallet to Launch Pre-TGE Prime Sale, First Project Announced on October 10th
data.description: According to an official announcement, Binance Wallet will launch a Pre-TGE PrimeSale program, aiming to provide users with early access to more mature projects. The first project is expected to be announced on the official X account at 1:30 PM (UTC) on October 10, 2025. Users can participate by depositing BNB. Tokens will be distributed proportionally, and will not be tradable until the official launch. (This newsletter was generated with AI assistance.)

data.title: Federal Reserve Considers Cautious Approach to Interest Rate Cuts
data.description: According to PANews, Federal Reserve Governor Waller has expressed the need for interest rate cuts, emphasizing a cautious approach. He is open to a 25 basis point reduction at the upcoming meeting. Waller highlighted the importance of caution due to potential labor market rebounds or GDP weakening. The Federal Reserve plans to proceed gradually, avoiding aggressive or rapid actions, with incremental steps of a quarter basis point. He noted that private credit contains significant equity and is not highly leveraged, suggesting that while some may incur losses, it should not be viewed as a major risk related to the stock market.

data.title: C1 Fund Acquires Stake in Ripple to Boost Digital Asset Investments
data.description: According to BlockBeats, C1 Fund has announced the acquisition of equity in Ripple, a provider of enterprise blockchain solutions. The fund has not disclosed the specific amount or percentage of the stake purchased. Previously, C1 Fund revealed plans to raise $60 million through a public offering to enhance its investments in the digital asset technology sector.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Comments on Labor Market and Upcoming CPI Data
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Federal Reserve Governor Waller expressed uncertainty about being the final candidate for the Fed Chair position. He noted that current data consistently indicates poor performance in the labor market. Waller emphasized that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) data will be significantly beneficial for the upcoming meeting.

data.title: Xinhuo Technology: Beware of scammers using the Xinhuo Technology name to induce investment
data.description: Sinohope Technology Holdings Limited (hereinafter referred to as "Sinohope Technology," including any of its subsidiaries, such as Sinohope Asset Management (Hong Kong) Limited, which holds licenses for Type 1, 4, and 9 regulated activities with the Securities and Futures Commission of Hong Kong) recently received information alleging that fraudsters are using Sinohope's name to trick investors into transferring funds or making top-ups. Sinohope emphasizes that the company will not solicit any form of fund transfers or top-ups through any channels. Sinohope will only communicate with customers through the methods published on its official website (www.sinohope.com). Investors should refrain from providing any personal or financial information if they encounter anyone claiming to be a Sinohope employee or representative through any other channel. Investors should refer to the SFC's warning list and, if they suspect a scam, call the Hong Kong Police Force's "Anti-Fraud Hotline" at 18222. To verify the identity of Sinohope employees or representatives, contact Sinohope through its official Twitter account (@SinohopeGroup).

data.title: Bitget distributes airdrop rewards to early traders of Binance Life and PALU
data.description: Bitget Onchain has launched its fourth Early Hunter airdrop, awarding airdrops to early traders of Binance Life and PALU tokens. Users who trade Binance Life on Bitget Onchain before 18:30 (UTC+8) on October 7, 2025, will receive 200 Binance Life tokens, while those who trade PALU before 12:30 (UTC+8) on the same day will receive 1,000 PALU tokens. The airdrops will be automatically distributed to eligible users' Onchain accounts within three business days of the announcement. Early Hunter is Bitget's exclusive reward program for early adopters of high-quality assets. The program will periodically partner with high-potential projects to award token airdrops, rewarding users who participate before a project gains wider market attention.

data.title: Binance Introduces Pre-TGE Prime Sale Edition for Enhanced Project Access
data.description:
According to the announcement from Binance, the Binance Wallet is launching a new Pre-Token Generation Event (Pre-TGE) Prime Sale edition. This initiative aims to provide users with early access to more mature projects that have demonstrated a higher level of development. Traditionally, acquiring tokens from such projects before their Token Generation Event (TGE) has been less accessible to most users. The Pre-TGE Prime Sale edition builds on the existing Binance Wallet Pre-TGE experience, focusing on expanding access to these advanced projects. The first project utilizing this model is expected to be announced on 2025-10-10 at 13:30 (UTC) via the official Binance Wallet X account.

The Pre-TGE Prime Sale edition operates similarly to previous Pre-TGEs on Binance Wallet. During the Prime Sale, users can subscribe to project tokens exclusively within the Binance Wallet. The subscription process follows an over-subscription model, allowing deposits up to a specified amount of BNB per user. Token allocation is proportional to the total BNB deposited by all participants. After the subscription period ends, users can claim their allocated tokens, which will be credited to their accounts but remain non-tradeable until the official launch date, as announced by the project. Any excess BNB will be automatically refunded.

The Pre-TGE Prime Sale offers several benefits, including access to more mature projects, broader project access, a verified user base, larger sale amounts, and fair distribution through transparent allocation mechanisms. The sale process is divided into three phases: BNB Deposit Subscription, Token Allocation (Non-Tradable), and Trading Opens on Binance Alpha. Some sales may incorporate Prime Sale Keys, which serve as proof of successful subscription. These keys are non-tradable and have no monetary value. Users are encouraged to conduct their own research and review the Terms of Use and Risk Warning before participating.
